# Hybrid A*

Kinematically aware search that expands continuous poses with motion primitives and heuristic guidance.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Planning</span>
  <span>search, nonholonomic, path planning</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize open set with start pose] --> B[Pop pose with lowest cost]
    B --> C{Goal pose reached?}
    C -- Yes --> D[Reconstruct kinematic path]
    C -- No --> E[Generate motion primitives]
    E --> F[Simulate next poses]
    F --> G{Collision free and valid?}
    G -- No --> B
    G -- Yes --> H[Update path cost and heuristic]
    H --> I[Push pose into open set]
    I --> B
```

## Notes

- Hybrid A* keeps a grid-based heuristic while expanding continuous vehicle states.
- It is widely used for car-like parking and low-speed maneuvering.
